name: command-center
description: Local-first AI-powered command dashboard. Open the app -> know what matters now.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build -w shared && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
